news.title: Improbable leverages improved financial profile to drive innovation in AI, the metaverse, and Web3 through venture building
news.summary: First-party Improbable update positioning the company around AI, metaverse and Web3 venture-building going into 2025.

news.title: Improbable deepens focus on AI & web3, appoints former Revolut & Bitpanda executive as Chief Marketing Officer

news.title: Improbable invests $2M in Otomato to scale the first portfolio-aware intelligence layer for DeFi
